parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format combining a 3D animated AI avatar on top and a human actor recorded on a smartphone on the bottom. The AI avatar exhibits typical 3D animation characteristics with slightly stiff, repetitive movements and lip-sync that isn't perfectly natural.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, green eyes, red hair styled in an updo. She has a smooth, 3D-animated appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Simple white top and gold hoop earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, fair complexion. He has dark hair, a beard, and a mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt and a white wireless earbud in his left ear.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, slightly hesitant initially, but becomes enthusiastic.

scenes.setting: Top: Cozy bedroom with string lights. Bottom: Simple room with white tiled wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up. She has fair skin, green eyes, and red hair styled in an updo. She is wearing a simple white top and gold hoop earrings. The background is a softly lit, cozy bedroom. Warm string lights are draped across the wall behind her. A small bedside lamp casts a gentle glow on the right side of the frame. Some plush toys are faintly visible on a shelf to the left. She maintains eye contact with the camera, displaying a friendly and encouraging expression.

A young man is framed in a close-up shot, looking directly at the camera. He has a medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, a beard, and a mustache. He is wearing a black t-shirt and a white wireless earbud in his left ear. The background consists of a plain white tiled wall on the left and a glimpse of a dark wooden chair on the right. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a smartphone selfie video. His facial expressions change dynamically as he speaks, showing slight hesitation and thought.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen video layout. The top half features a 3D animated female character, while the bottom half shows a live-action male. A banner of Spanish flags is overlaid at the very top edge of the frame. Subtitles appear in the center of the screen, bridging the two panels. The overall composition remains static as the two characters converse.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Can you speak Spanish?
Character B says: Uuuh... a little?
Character A says: Okay, what Spanish words do you know?
Character B says: Hola.
Character A says: Nice! What else?
Character B says: Gracias.
Character A says: Good! And what do you say when you make a mistake?
Character B says: Uhh... sorry?
Character A says: Almost! Repeat after me: "Lo siento."
Character B says: Lo siento.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Can you speak Spanish?
Uuuh... ¿un poco?
Uuuh... a little?
Okay, what Spanish words do you know?
Hola.
Hello.
Nice! What else?
Gracias.
Thanks.
Good! And what do you say when you make a mistake?
Uhh... sorry?
Almost! Repeat after me:
"Lo siento."
"I'm sorry."
Lo siento.
I'm sorry.

scenes.setting: Top: Cozy bedroom with string lights. Bottom: Simple room with white tiled wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up. She has fair skin, green eyes, and red hair styled in an updo. She is wearing a simple white top and gold hoop earrings. The background is a softly lit, cozy bedroom. Warm string lights are draped across the wall behind her. A small bedside lamp casts a gentle glow on the right side of the frame. She maintains eye contact with the camera, speaking with an informative and persuasive demeanor.

A young man is framed in a close-up shot, looking directly at the camera. He has a medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, a beard, and a mustache. He is wearing a black t-shirt and a white wireless earbud in his left ear. The background consists of a plain white tiled wall on the left and a glimpse of a dark wooden chair on the right. The lighting is bright and even. He listens attentively, occasionally showing a skeptical or questioning expression.

scenes.visual_description: The vertical split-screen layout continues unchanged. The animated female character remains in the top panel, and the live-action male is in the bottom panel. The banner of Spanish flags is still visible at the top. Subtitles continue to appear in the center of the screen as the characters discuss AI tutors.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Your level is A1, but that's totally fine.
Character B says: I don't speak Spanish... I just watch series with subtitles.
Character A says: That's enough to start! You can practice with AI tutors like me.
Character B says: Like you?
Character A says: Yes! Praktika has AI Spanish tutors who correct you and talk to you naturally. You'll start speaking Spanish much faster.
Character B says: Oh, but... with an AI?
Character A says: You won't lose anything by trying, and it will be worth it.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up. She has fair skin, green eyes, and red hair styled in an updo. She is wearing a simple white top and gold hoop earrings. The background is a softly lit, cozy bedroom. Warm string lights are draped across the wall behind her. A small bedside lamp casts a gentle glow on the right side of the frame. She looks directly at the camera, displaying a playful and commanding expression.

A young man is framed in a close-up shot, looking directly at the camera. He has a medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, a beard, and a mustache. He is wearing a black t-shirt and a white wireless earbud in his left ear. The background consists of a plain white tiled wall on the left and a glimpse of a dark wooden chair on the right. The lighting is bright and even. He reacts with a mix of apology and enthusiastic agreement, raising his hands slightly.

scenes.visual_description: The vertical split-screen layout persists. The animated female character is on top, and the live-action male is on the bottom. The Spanish flag banner remains at the top edge. Subtitles are displayed in the center as the male character agrees to download the app and the female character delivers the call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Okay... teach me Spanish.
Character A says: I will! But don't start giving orders to your new teacher.
Character B says: Ah... lo siento!
Character A says: Go download Praktika right now.
Character B says: Okay, okay! I'm going!
scenes.on_screen_text:

panels.panel_visual_description: A completely blank, solid white background fills the entire frame. There are no characters, props, or environmental details present. The lighting is flat and uniform across the surface. The composition is entirely empty, serving as a clean slate.

scenes.visual_description: A static end card screen. The background is solid white. The app's logo is prominently displayed in the center. Below the logo, there are badges for the Google Play Store and the Apple App Store.
